title: Secure Cybersecurity Incident Response Plan
scenario: Develop a comprehensive cybersecurity incident response plan for a large enterprise, including procedures for detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident activities. Generate a detailed incident response plan document in standard business report format. Ensure the output is under 500 words and includes clear section headings and concise bullet points.
constraints: Must include a detailed section on incident communication and notification procedures
Must use a formal business tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the output adheres to all specified formatting and content constraints.
Judge the professionalism and clarity of the incident response plan language.
Check that the plan includes necessary incident response procedures and activities.
